title: KINGSFORD® CONTINUES CELEBRATION OF BLACK BARBECUE CULTURE WITH SECOND YEAR OF PRESERVE THE PIT™
text: OAKLAND, Calif., Jan. 31, 2022  /PRNewswire/ -- As a leader in barbecue for more than 100 years, Kingsford remains committed to celebrating Black barbecue culture by launching its second year of the Preserve the Pit fellowship and doubling its commitment to investing in aspiring barbecue professionals.

title: Clorox (CLX) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Clorox (CLX) Q2 results are likely to reflect impacts of unfavorable price mix, lower shipments, and elevated logistics and commodity costs. Its IGNITE strategy and productivity initiatives bode well.

title: Clorox Q2 Earnings Preview: Can Price Increases Offset Inflationary Pressure?
text: Clorox is scheduled to report fiscal 2022 second-quarter earnings on Feb. 3.

title: Credit Suisse Downgrades This Cleaning Products Manufacturer - Read Why
text: The analyst thinks a large portion of Clorox's growth during the first phase of the pandemic came from categories that are now declining.

title: Clorox downgraded as COVID-driven growth slows
text: Clorox Co. CLX, -4.75% shares fell 4.2% in Wednesday trading after the consumer cleaning products company was downgraded to underperform from neutral at Credit Suisse based on concern that the skyrocketing growth from early in the pandemic has started to wane. Analysts maintained their $160 target price.

title: Wednesday's Premarket: 5 S&P 500 Winners, 5 Losers
text: The three major U.S. equities indexes again closed lower on Tuesday. The Nasdaq closed 2.3% lower, the Dow Jones industrials dipped by 0.2% and the S&P 500 lost 1.2%.

title: Clorox Stock Struggling to Justify Valuation Ahead of Earnings
text: The shares of Clorox Co (NYSE:CLX) are up 0.5% to trade at $180.71 today, as the company gears up for its fiscal second-quarter earnings report, due out after the close on Thursday, Feb. 3.

title: Clorox Announces Feb. 3 Webcast of Second-Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Results
text: OAKLAND, Calif., Jan. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) announced today it will issue its second-quarter fiscal year 2022 results on Thursday, Feb. 3, 2022, as follows: 1:15 p.m.
